userMessage: Set up CAN FD decode on B1 source CH2 500kbps nominal 2Mbps data phase ISO standard. Set up search on B1 for CAN FD error frames. Set edge trigger on CH2 rising 1.65V. Enable FastFrame 500 frames single sequence. After capture query FastFrame timestamp for all frames, save CH2 waveform as binary and screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate flow JSON for this turn.

Verified enough:
- CAN bus setup on `B1`
  - `BUS:B1:TYPE CAN`
  - `BUS:B1:CAN:SOURCE CH2`
  - `BUS:B1:CAN:BITRATE RATE500K`
  - `BUS:B1:CAN:FD:BITRATE RATE2M`
  - `BUS:B1:CAN:STANDARD FDISO`
- Search definition pieces
  - `SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGGER:A:TYPE Bus`
  - `SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGGER:A:BUS:SOURCE B1`
  - `SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGGER:A:BUS:CAN:CONDITION ...`
  - `SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGGER:A:BUS:CAN:FRAMETYPE ERROR`
- Edge trigger
  - `TRIGGER:A:EDGE:SOURCE CH2`
  - `TRIGGER:A:EDGE:SLOPE RISE`
  - `TRIGGER:A:LEVEL:CH2 1.65`
- FastFrame
  - `HORIZONTAL:FASTFRAME:STATE ON`
  - `HORIZONTAL:FASTFRAME:COUNT 500`
  - `ACQUIRE:STOPAFTER SEQUENCE`
  - `ACQUIRE:STATE RUN`
  - `HORIZONTAL:FASTFRAME:TIMESTAMP:ALL?`
- Built-ins
  - `save_waveform`
  - `save_screenshot`

But verification is still insufficient for a reliable as-is flow because:
- no verified completion/wait primitive was retrieved for “after capture” synchronization before `HORizontal:FASTframe:TIMEStamp:ALL?`
- no verified search enable/state command was retrieved if the instrument requires explicit activation beyond configuration

If you want, next turn I can build it immediately once you provide a verified completion command such as a retrieved `*OPC?`/equivalent or a verified acquisition-done poll command.
